symbols: golden semi-dome — the glory of heaven represented in the sanctuary
red columns — the blood of Christ supporting the structure of the Church
mosaic pattern — the assembled fragments of creation unified in sacred space
description: A semi-abstract painting depicting the apse of a church. A large golden semi-circular dome dominates the upper portion, rendered with a textured, mosaic-like surface of golden-brown squares. Below, two red vertical columns flank the central space. The lower portion shows a patterned surface of multicolored small stones or mosaic tiles. A red rectangular shape (possibly an altar or door) sits at center bottom. The background is dark green. The style is simplified and geometric.
